sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamps (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-09-01 12:00:00'), (2, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-09-05 08:30:00');
SELECT least(event_time, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-09-04 10:15:00') AS earliest_event FROM timestamps;
UPDATE timestamps SET event_time = least(event_time, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-09-02 14:00:00') WHERE id = 2;
DELETE FROM timestamps WHERE event_time = least(TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-09-01 12:00:00', TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-09-06 09:00:00');
